name: Navidrome Cast Bridge
author: Stephen Hoos
description: Forwards Navidrome playback events to the Navidrome Cast Bridge companion service.

bridge_url.title: Cast Bridge URL
bridge_url.description: Base URL for the companion Cast bridge service. Example: http://host.docker.internal:4545 or http://192.168.1.6:4545

cast_device.title: Cast Device
cast_device.description: Optional Cast receiver name or group to control, for example All My Speakers.

auto_cast.title: Auto-cast playback reports
auto_cast.description: When enabled, Navidrome playback reports will be mirrored to the configured Cast device.

http.reason: POST playback events to the local Navidrome Cast Bridge companion service

users.reason: Receive playback/scrobble callbacks for users assigned to this plugin
